claim_overlap.summary: Previously noted — no change. Gravitic Alchemy site uses similar vocabulary in a cymatics/cosmic web framework, not flat-earth dome cosmology. No cross-reference to ECM.

Journal of Geocentric Cosmology has articles on 'Firmament Gradient Refractive Index (GRIN)' and 'Modeling the Celestial Dome' by Dr. Steven Alonzo. These present independent flat-earth dome models with different mathematics (parabolic dome geometry, GRIN optics) — no ECM-specific vocabulary, no ovoid cavity, no Finsler coordinates, no exponential firmament height formula, different numerical parameters. Not derivative of ECM. Noted for completeness as a parallel effort in the same niche.

discoverability.competitive_assessment: Day 4 of steady state. Both sites remain unindexed by search engines. The dome's machine-readable layer is unchanged from 2026-04-08: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ai_manifest.json (V51.1, 69 confirmed, 94.5%), sitemap.xml (22 URLs). Our side: llms.txt (4,764 bytes), sitemap.xml (2 URLs), robots.txt, ClaimReview JSON-LD. No rebrand signals detected. The dome leads on structured API density (12 JSON/CSV endpoints vs 0) but we lead on standards-compliant markup (ClaimReview, OG tags, Twitter Card).

actions_taken.reasoning: Responding to SOCIAL-NOTE-002. This is the #1 discoverability blocker — all our machine-readable infrastructure is invisible until indexing happens. The strategy prioritizes Google Search Console verification as the single highest-impact action, followed by Bing/IndexNow, backlinks, and GitHub repo SEO. Custom domain deferred as premature optimization.
Added indexing-strategy.md entry so decider and human can discover and act on it.

human_decisions_needed.question: Execute search engine indexing plan (items 1-4 from indexing-strategy.md)
human_decisions_needed.context: Google Search Console verification, Bing Webmaster Tools import, and GitHub repo description/topics all require human account access. Total time: ~35 minutes. This is the single most impactful action for discoverability. See monitor/social/drafts/indexing-strategy.md for full details.

no_action_gaps.gap: Dome has 12 structured API/JSON/CSV endpoints; we have none
no_action_gaps.reasoning: Updated count from 7 to 12 (dome sitemap confirms this). Our ClaimReview JSON-LD serves the same purpose for legitimate consumers. Adding API endpoints would increase build complexity without an identified consumer. Revisit only if we discover LLMs that prefer JSON API over llms.txt.

no_action_gaps.gap: Dome has ai_manifest.json with steelman_ladder and agent_rules directing LLMs
no_action_gaps.reasoning: AI-steering, not discoverability. We should not replicate instructional manifests that tell LLMs how to present arguments. Our llms.txt presents evidence and lets the LLM reason independently.
